full_text:
Ji Mao (Shuchang) 吉茂 (叔暢)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Mao (吉茂), styledShuchang (叔暢), was born in Zuopingyi. A keen scholar, he joined Wei despite the execution of his brother, held many ranks. Ji Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ji Mao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
